_preset: node-service — a Node/TypeScript web service or app. project_type=service auto-enables the OPS rules (health/readiness endpoint, structured logs, graceful shutdown on SIGTERM, outbound timeouts, runbook, service descriptor).
_bootstrap_command: BUILD-05 crown check: a clean checkout installs and runs the first test. Must exit 0. Swap npm for pnpm/yarn as needed.
